name: The Combine
description: The corporate mega-state that owns most of core space. Not evil per se — just profit-driven to the point where 'evil' is a rounding error in the quarterly report. They build everything, own everything, and charge interest on everything else.
territory: Core systems, major stations, established trade routes
assets: Largest fleet in known space (corporate security, not military — there's a difference in the paperwork)
goals: Maintain monopoly on fold drive technology
attitude_toward_leviathan: Irrelevant. A salvage vessel is beneath notice unless it becomes a liability or an asset.
notes: The Combine doesn't hate you. Hate requires caring. You're a line item.
